name: JSONPlaceholder - Complete User Data
description: Fetch complete user data with posts, comments, and albums from JSONPlaceholder

config.sql:
SELECT 
  user_id,
  'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/' || user_id as user_url,
  'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/' || user_id || '/posts' as posts_url,
  'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/' || user_id || '/albums' as albums_url,
  'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/' || user_id || '/todos' as todos_url,
  'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/users/' || user_id || '/comments' as comments_url
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY user_id
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
  user_id,
  user_url,
  'name,email,phone,website,company' as user_fields,
  posts_url,
  albums_url,
  todos_url,
  comments_url,
  'https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/guide/' as documentation
FROM {{input}}
ORDER BY user_id
